title: Conservative Legislator Wins Republican Nomination for Oregon Governor
description: Christine Drazan’s victory in the Republican primary sets up a rematch with Gov. Tina Kotek, a Democrat, in November.
author: Anna Griffin

title: Idaho’s Republican Governor Wins Primary in Race for a Third Term
description: Gov. Brad Little will be heavily favored in a general election contest against an independent former state Supreme Court justice and a Democrat vowing to undo conservative policies.
author: Anna Griffin

title: Trump Crushes Republican Dissent: 8 Takeaways From Tuesday’s Primaries
description: President Trump unseated Representative Thomas Massie, a top Republican critic in Congress, and also got his way in other primary contests.
author: Reid J. Epstein

title: Mike Collins and Derek Dooley Head to G.O.P. Senate Runoff in Georgia
description: Mr. Collins and Mr. Dooley are set to face each other on June 16 as they compete for the chance to challenge Senator Jon Ossoff, a popular Democrat.
author: Tim Balk

title: Senate Primary in Alabama to Replace Tommy Tuberville Heads to Runoff
description: In the race to replace Senator Tommy Tuberville, Representative Barry Moore was leading a multicandidate field that included Jared Hudson, a former Navy SEAL, and Steve Marshall, the state attorney general.
author: Shane Goldmacher

title: Bob Brooks, Labor Leader Backed by Top Democrats, Wins Pennsylvania House Primary
description: Mr. Brooks will face Representative Ryan Mackenzie, a Republican, in the fall. He earned endorsements from across his party, including Senator Bernie Sanders of Vermont and Gov. Josh Shapiro of Pennsylvania.
author: Kellen Browning and Taylor Robinson

title: Democratic leaders denounce a party candidate as ‘antisemitic.’
description: Democrats accused Republicans of propping up a fringe candidate in Texas, Maureen Galindo, in hopes of pushing her past a more viable Democrat in a House runoff next week.
author: J. David Goodman

title: Former Atlanta Mayor Wins Democratic Primary for Georgia Governor
description: Keisha Lance Bottoms will be the Democratic standard-bearer, despite worries about her single term as mayor of the state’s biggest city.
author: Rick Rojas

title: A Tuberville-Jones Rematch Is Set for the Alabama Governor Race
description: Senator Tommy Tuberville, a Republican, will face the Democrat that he defeated in 2020, Doug Jones, after both easily won their primaries.
author: Emily Cochrane

title: 5 Things to Know About Ed Gallrein, Republican House Candidate in Kentucky
description: Mr. Gallrein ran with President Trump’s support.
author: Tim Balk

title: Trump’s Stock Trades Raise Eyebrows. The Family Says He Keeps His Hands Off.
description: The Trump Organization says the president’s financial investments are handled by outside firms and that it has no control over the timing or selection of transactions.
author: Ben Protess

title: Republican Primary for Georgia Governor Will Go to a Runoff
description: The state’s lieutenant governor, Burt Jones, will face a billionaire health care executive, Rick Jackson, on June 16 to decide the party’s standard-bearer to succeed Gov. Brian Kemp.
author: Rick Rojas

title: Dallas Fort Worth Airport Cancels Hundreds of Flights as Storms Hit Texas
description: Much of the state is expected to face heavy rain for the rest of the week.
author: Erin McCann and Mark Walker

title: 25 States Sue Over Changes Limiting Federal Loans for Nursing Degrees
description: Governors and attorneys general from the states and District of Columbia argue the Education Department’s decision not to label nursing as a professional degree will contribute to worker shortages.
author: Michael C. Bender

title: The San Diego Mosque Shootings Were a Crime Made for and by the Internet
description: Authorities said the teenagers who killed three men met online, posted their writings there and livestreamed the killings.
author: Tim Arango, Chelsia Rose Marcius, Madison Malone Kircher and Nicholas Bogel-Burroughs

title: Voters in Georgia say they’re wary of efforts to unseat Sanford Bishop.
description: fut to unseat Black Democrat in Georgia could backfire, voters say.
author: Brendan Farrington

title: Amid Global Turmoil, Trump Shows Off White House Ballroom Construction
description: President Trump showed off the construction on his ballroom project, providing a deeper look at the things that matter to him.
author: Luke Broadwater

title: Alabama’s Republican Senate Primary: Key Regions to Watch
description: Barry Moore has led in numerous polls, but a three-way race is likely to advance to a runoff.
author: Alex Lemonides

title: Thomas Massie Loses Kentucky House Primary to Trump-Backed Ed Gallrein
description: Representative Thomas Massie, President Trump’s chief G.O.P. antagonist in the House, lost to Ed Gallrein, Mr. Trump’s handpicked candidate.
author: Robert Draper

title: Early War Goal Was to Install Hard Line Former President as Iran’s Leader
description: An Israeli strike designed to free Mahmoud Ahmadinejad from house arrest in Tehran, U.S. officials said, was part of an effort to bring about regime change and put him in power.
author: Mark Mazzetti, Julian E. Barnes, Farnaz Fassihi and Ronen Bergman
